evidence_bindings: 7zz installed locally and smoke-tested against current authority ZIP
uploaded decorators article mapped to structured logging, bounded retry, and fail-closed fallback patterns
hard_rules: No fallback can convert a failed governance gate into success.
Do not delete the existing runtime root before verifying source authority and/or alternate root.
Full extraction of large OS bundles remains forbidden-by-default unless bounded and checkpointed.
External Python packages are advisory/non-boot-critical unless later validated and internalized in a separate bounded stage.
route_order: verify existing runtime root before deleting/reextracting

7zz.role: official 7-Zip fallback and independent archive validator
